violations.text: The doors to the outside, located beside the milk chest coolers, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors at the bottom. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

The doors to the outside, located beside the milk chest coolers, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the doors at the bottom. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

Dishwasher is not operational at this time. Paper products are being used for food service and utensils are sent to the commissary kitchen to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025

The doors to the outside, located beside milk chest coolers, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee has taken an approved course in food safety management and is scheduled for test. Once certificate is received, employee must be registered with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The doors to the outside, located beside the milk chest coolers, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors and at the bottom. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

The doors to the outside, located beside the milk/storage room, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between and at the bottom of the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the storage area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2023

Soap was not available for use at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. The soap refill has not been inserted into the dispenser for ease of access. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap that is easily accessible for proper hand-washing. Soap dispenser must be properly filled. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2023

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the storage area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2023
